because.text: Adopted per Decision Process: gate 3 reviews, R1 2:1 over R2, maintainer adjudicated the split (both R1 answers defeat the boolean-app-invisibility scenario within R1: phase visibility now, opt-in full pins where mass is needed; R2 asserts values nobody computed). Book II s2 field-level WavePin semantics, s2.1 absent base case, s6.2 normative FALSE row {ph=49152 pin, am=0, en=-32512 derived} with the cascade stated as a theorem. Oracle grew the pin table and wave() over symbolic terms; wave_vectors.json format v2 (14 vectors): WV-FALSE-DERIVED, WV-FALSE-ANCESTOR-SILENT, WV-PH-ONLY-ABSENT, WV-UNPINNED-LITERAL-ABSENT, WV-ITER-DECAY (49151->36863->20735->6560->657->7->0). Wave-not-in-hash preserved: zero effect on Book I.

subject.note: ADOPT ADR-005 in v0.5.1 (wave totality: field-level pins R1, absent base case, FALSE normative row)
